ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating (1-5 scale) */,
  "education_level" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "seniority_level" INTEGER /* Seniority level of the employee */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the employee */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus awarded to the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Employee's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Employee's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Employee's email address */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the employee is currently active */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the employee (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_seniority_level FOREIGN KEY ("seniority_level") REFERENCES seniority_levels ("seniority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_education_level FOREIGN KEY ("education_level") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department they manage */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Manager's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Manager's phone number */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the manager is currently active */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the manager */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the manager (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating awarded during the review (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the review */,
  "reviewer_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "employee_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the employee */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., annual, mid-year) */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review is final */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., College, Masters, PhD) */,
  "is_advanced" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the education level is considered advanced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seniority_levels" (
  "seniority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seniority level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the seniority level (e.g., Junior, Mid-Level, Senior) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the seniority level */,
  "is_management" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the seniority level is a management position */,
  "required_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience required for the seniority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seniority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Quality, Efficiency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the metric in performance evaluations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the salary record */,
  "salary_date" TEXT /* Date the salary was recorded */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Salary amount of the employee */,
  "bonus_amount" REAL /* Bonus amount awarded to the employee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the salary change became effective */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the salary change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonuses" (
  "bonus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bonus record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the bonus */,
  "bonus_date" TEXT /* Date the bonus was awarded */,
  "bonus_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bonus */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for awarding the bonus */,
  "awarded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who awarded the bonus */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the bonus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bonus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonuses_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonuses_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonuses_awarded_by FOREIGN KEY ("awarded_by") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payrolls" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee for whom the payroll is processed */,
  "payroll_date" TEXT /* Date of payroll processing */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Net salary amount after deductions */,
  "bonus_amount" REAL /* Total bonus amount processed */,
  "tax_withheld" REAL /* Total tax withheld from salary */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., direct deposit, check) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payrolls_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., HR, IT, Sales) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_supervisory" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role involves supervisory responsibilities */,
  "required_certifications" TEXT /* Certifications required for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_roles" (
  "employee_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee-role mapping */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started in the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee ended the role (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_roles_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_records" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who attended the training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification received upon completion */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the training */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training in hours */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_records_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_shifts" (
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shift record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee assigned to the shift */,
  "shift_date" TEXT /* Date of the shift */,
  "shift_start" TEXT /* Start time of the shift */,
  "shift_end" TEXT /* End time of the shift */,
  "hours_worked" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked during the shift */,
  "overtime_hours" INTEGER /* Number of overtime hours worked during the shift */,
  "shift_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the shift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_shifts_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
